top_signals.title: Gold Holds Losses as Iran Impasse Keeps Rate Hike Bets High
top_signals.summary: Gold held a decline as a lack of progress in reopening the Strait of Hormuz continued to fuel concerns over inflation and increase bets that global central banks may hike interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
